description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem multi-terminal dc line converters. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, rarray = amultitrmdcconvreal(sid, ties, flag, entry, string)
python_syntax: ierr, rarray = amultitrmdcconvreal(sid, ties, flag, entry, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem converter buses of multi-terminal dc lines to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem multi-terminal dc line converters to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: A flag indicating organization. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the multi-terminal dc line converter quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for each end of interior subsystem multi-terminal dc lines only.
for the subsystem bus ends of tie multi-terminal dc lines only.
for the non-subsystem bus ends of tie multi-terminal dc lines only.
for each end of tie multi-terminal dc lines only.
for each end of interior subsystem multi-terminal dc lines and the subsystem bus ends of tie multi-terminal dc lines.
for each end of interior subsystem multi-terminal dc lines and tie multi-terminal dc lines.

flag.description: for only in-service multi-terminal dc lines.

string.description: Converter dc current in amps.
Voltage (kV) current (amps) or power (MW) setpoint.
ac current in amps at the converter bus.
ac current in pu at the converter bus.
Converter bus dc voltage in kV.
Converter angle in degrees.
Minimum steady-state converter angle in degrees.
Nominal maximum converter angle in degrees.
Converter bus tap setting in pu.
Maximum tap setting in pu.
Minimum tap setting in pu.
Tap step in pu.
Transformer ratio in pu.
Commutating transformer resistance per bridge in ohms.
Commutating transformer reactance per bridge in ohms.
Primary base ac voltage in kV.
Rectifier margin in pu of desired dc power or current.
Converter participation factor.
Apparent active power flow into the dc line at the converter bus in MW.
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line at the converter bus in Mvar.
Apparent ac power flow into the dc line at the converter bus in MVA.
Total dc line active power losses in MW.
Total dc line reactive power losses in Mvar.
Apparent active power flow into the dc line at the converter bus (units determined by power output options).
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line at the converter bus (units determined by power output options).
Apparent ac power flow into the dc line at the converter bus (units determined by power output options).
Total dc line active power losses (units determined by power output options).
Total dc line reactive power losses (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
